name: Cranberry Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dried cranberries (I used ~10 sundried tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick pan, heat mushrooms and onions over medium heat until mushrooms are browned.
2. Stir in broth, garlic pepper seasoning blend, and mustard. Bring to a boil.
3. Add remaining ingredients except spinach; reduce heat to low.
4. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring once.
5. Stir in spinach; cover and continue simmering about 45 minutes or until water is absorbed and barley and wild rice are tender.
I doubled this recipe so that we would have leftover servings for lunch. I knew the dish would be a little bland, so I used the seasoning packet that came with the wild rice. It turned out great and was easy to make.
